description: The Berlin Group is a European standards initiative that publishes scheme-independent specifications for payments interoperability, open banking, and open finance. Its site provides downloadable technical frameworks such as NextGenPSD2 and openFinance, plus general information about the organization and its working groups.
summary: berlin-group.org exposes a public Wix MCP endpoint for the website and publishes two public HTTP API specification surfaces: NextGenPSD2 and openFinance OpenAPI downloads/repos.
